The forced joint fit agrees: joint reduced-χ² = 7.8 (zach) and 18.0 (chromatica), and chromatica's per-band slopes disagree outright (CHIME +1.68 vs DSA +6.48).
So the rule is working. freya's n/a is genuine marginal behavior — with the pre-burst off it fails to resolve enough physical subbands (its 1445 MHz subband rails to γ=20).
